fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the entry, as assigned from the specified number series when the entry was created.

fields.name: G/L Register No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the general ledger register, where the general ledger entry in this record was posted.

fields.name: Source Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the source code that specifies where the entry was created.

fields.name: Journal Batch Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the journal batch, a personalized journal layout, that the entries were posted from.

fields.name: Transaction No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the transaction that was reversed.

fields.name: Source Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the source type that applies to the source number that is shown in the Source No. field.

fields.name: Source No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies where the entry originated.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency code for the amount on the line.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the record.

fields.name: Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount on the entry to be reversed.

fields.name: Debit Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the ledger entries that represent debits.

fields.name: Credit Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the ledger entries that represent credits.

fields.name: Amount (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of the entry in LCY.

fields.name: Debit Amount (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the ledger entries that represent debits, expressed in LCY.

fields.name: Credit Amount (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the ledger entries that represent credits, expressed in LCY.

fields.name: VAT Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of VAT that is included in the total amount.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posting date for the entry.

fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document type that the entry belongs to.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document number of the transaction that created the entry.

fields.name: Account No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the account number that the reversal was posted to.

fields.name: Account Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies erroneous postings that you want to undo by using the Reverse function.

fields.name: Bal. Account Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of account that a balancing entry is posted to, such as BANK for a cash account.

fields.name: Bal. Account No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the general ledger, customer, vendor, or bank account that the balancing entry is posted to, such as a cash account for cash purchases.

fields.name: FA Posting Category
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posting category that is used for fixed assets.

fields.name: FA Posting Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posting type, if Account Type field contains Fixed Asset.
